message:
🐛 Eliminate page flash on dashboard navigation (#247)

Show cached data immediately when navigating between dashboard pages
instead of briefly flashing skeleton loading states.

Changes:
- Guard page-level skeletons with data emptiness checks so they only
  show on the very first load when no cached data exists
- Fix StatsOverview callers across 11 pages to pass
  isLoading && data.length === 0 instead of raw isLoading
- Fix useDeployments and useServices hooks to not reset cached state
  on mount (useEffect was clearing cached data on every mount, not
  just on param changes)

This matches the Events page behavior which never flashes because it
uses localStorage-backed caching via useCachedEvents.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
